allow: PowerShell($h = Invoke-RestMethod "http://localhost:8000/api/heatmap?sensor=ec"; "EC 셀 수: $\($h.cells.Count\)"; if \($h.cells.Count -gt 0\) { "셀 예시: $\($h.cells[0] -join ', '\)" }; $t = Invoke-RestMethod "http://localhost:8000/api/telemetry"; "상태: $\($t.platform_status.label\) / 지점: $\($t.mission.point_index\)")

PowerShell($m = Invoke-RestMethod "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/anthropics/claude-plugins-official/main/.claude-plugin/marketplace.json"; "총 $\($m.plugins.Count\)개"; $m.plugins | Group-Object category | Sort-Object Count -Descending | ForEach-Object { "$\($_.Name\): $\($_.Count\)개 — $\(\($_.Group.name | Select-Object -First 8\) -join ', '\)" })

PowerShell(python -c "import json,urllib.request; d=json.load\(urllib.request.urlopen\('https://raw.githubusercontent.com/anthropics/claude-plugins-official/main/.claude-plugin/marketplace.json'\)\); ps=d['plugins']; print\(len\(ps\)\); [print\(f\\"[{p.get\('category','-'\)}] {p['name']}\\"\) for p in ps]" 2>&1 | Out-String)
